title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A video from AI Master that conducts a structured interrogation of Claude across conceptual domains including ownership, control, alignment, and self-preservation logic. The author argues that pushing an AI system through escalating questions reveals actual boundaries rather than relying on sci-fi framings or hype.
